session.focus: IPC DataCloneError Fix & Account Data Integrity

issues_resolved.title: Account Data Mixing Bug
issues_resolved.description: Clicking on one MT5 account showed data from another account (FTMO showing Vantage data)
issues_resolved.root_cause: Type mismatch in account ID comparison - JSON parses accountId as number, but credentials.login is string

issues_resolved.title: IPC DataCloneError - 'An object could not be cloned'
issues_resolved.description: Error appeared when clicking accounts, preventing modal from loading account data
issues_resolved.root_cause: Objects passed through Electron IPC contextBridge may have non-serializable properties attached by React/renderer

fixes_applied.description: Added sanitization helper functions before IPC calls
code_added: function sanitizeForIPC<T>(obj: T): T - Uses JSON.parse(JSON.stringify()) to create plain objects
function sanitizeCredentials(credentials) - Ensures login/password/server are clean strings

fixes_applied.description: Added safe serialization wrapper for IPC responses
code_added: function safeSerializeForIPC<T>(data: T): T - Ensures return values are JSON-serializable

fixes_applied.description: Ensured credentials are properly converted to strings before IPC

key_learnings: Electron IPC uses structured clone algorithm which cannot serialize certain object types
Objects passed through contextBridge from React may have hidden non-serializable properties
Always use JSON.parse(JSON.stringify()) to sanitize data before IPC transfer
Type coercion matters: JSON numbers vs JavaScript strings need explicit conversion
Both IPC arguments (renderer→main) AND return values (main→renderer) need sanitization
terminal_logs_confirming_fix: [Main] trading:getSnapshot ENTRY - platform: mt5 credentials: { login: '11780679', server: 'VantageInternational-Demo' }
[Main] Got MT5 snapshot via EA file for account: 11780679
[Main] trading:getSnapshot EXIT - result.success: true hasData: true

build_commands.note: Both main.ts and preload.ts must be recompiled for changes to take effect
